title: plagiostigma pineum
intro: Plagiostigma pineum, also known as Thai angel's trumpet, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The medicinal properties of Plagiostigma pineum include its antifungal, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Plagiostigma pineum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various conditions, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
